name: 1340 Shield
description: A Vladof absorb shield with an onboard voice module that announces key shield states, including low charge, shield breaks, elemental hits, and full recharge. Outside of the voice lines, it behaves much like a standard blue absorb shield.
notes:
Despite being a Vladof shield, it uses the same visual model as a blue Hyperion amp shield.

If Gaige gives it to Deathtrap through Sharing is Caring, it can bug out like other Vladof shields and may keep playing voice lines even after the shield is gone and Deathtrap is taking health damage.

special.description: Includes a unique voice module that uses Loader 1340's voice. It has no other exclusive effect.
special.title: If you can't beat 'em, join 'em.

abilities: Absorbed ammo is added to your backpack.
